acceptance_criteria: installed payload resolves m365_runtime from payload path only
installed payload readiness reaches ready/success after auth
dependency behavior is declared and fail-closed rather than accidental ModuleNotFoundError
release acceptance uses real local socket and unpatched ucp_m365_pack.client.execute_m365_action
conformance scans full payload and fails on source-root fallback strings
provenance is clean-source reproducible for GO
SHA256SUMS passes in the 0.1.2 install directory
current_truth: The installed 1.1.1 artifact can complete SmartHaus delegated device-code auth.
The installed 1.1.1 payload can execute live read-only Microsoft Graph graph.me.
Installed-payload readiness remains not_ready with art=false.
The dependency contract is implicit and fails under plain system Python.
The release acceptance must prove real local socket httpx client execution without patching _http_runtime_invoke.
Provenance must be clean-source reproducible before final GO.
governing_formula: PackReady(v) = VersionCorrect(v) and ArtifactSelfDescribing(v) and DependencyClosed(v) and SourceIndependent(v) and RuntimeLaunches(v) and AuthLifecycleWorks(v) and ReadinessReady(v) and ClientSocketAcceptance(v) and LiveReadOnlyGraph(v) and ProvenanceReproducible(v) and EvidenceSynchronized(v)
objective: Correct the M365 standalone Graph runtime pack version line to 0.1.2 and repair formal pack readiness defects before any release claim.

requirements.acceptance: Plan triplet, prompt pair, execution plan, file index, and action log are synchronized.
requirements.title: Governed 0.1.2 fix-plan package

requirements.acceptance: All active docs/tooling identify 0.1.2 as the corrective artifact and 1.1.x as historical prerelease evidence.
requirements.title: Baseline truth and version correction

requirements.acceptance: Notebook-backed invariants exist for version, artifact layout, dependency closure, source independence, socket acceptance, readiness, and provenance.
requirements.title: MA formula, calculus, lemmas, invariants, and notebook gate

requirements.acceptance: Extracted installed payload readiness no longer fails the art clause.

evidence.payload_self_describing: pack_metadata.json staged in payload root; install_dir has both envelope and inner-payload files

requirements.title: Artifact layout and readiness repair

requirements.acceptance: The pack runs from a declared dependency environment or fails closed with an explicit dependency_missing report.
requirements.title: Dependency contract repair

requirements.acceptance: UCP-facing client execute_m365_action uses unpatched httpx against the local installed runtime URL.
requirements.title: Real local socket acceptance

requirements.acceptance: Clean source state can reproduce the 0.1.2 artifact with byte-identical bundle hash.

evidence.blocker: source.clean=false; CTO commit + clean-source rebuild required before final GO can record clean reproducible provenance

requirements.title: Provenance and reproducible build

requirements.acceptance: 0.1.2 is installed in the local store, SHA256SUMS passes, readiness is ready/success after auth, and graph.me succeeds live.
requirements.title: Build, install, evidence sync, and live read-only proof

release_decision_reasons: C8 source.clean=false; provenance correctly records claims_clean_reproducible=false; CTO commit + clean-source rebuild required before GO.
stop_conditions: 1.1.1 is treated as the formal ready artifact
any active artifact emits a 1.1.x release version
readiness success bypasses the installed payload path
dependency success depends on the repo venv without explicit contract
release acceptance patches the runtime HTTP invocation
provenance claims clean reproducibility from a dirty source tree
token, secret, private key, auth code, or refresh token is logged
